case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS KIDANE, AZEB T.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. MR. WEINER PRESENT ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY OTHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
